inline_comments.message: it would be nice to illustrate it with a real example ~ sample and integrate this example in CI later.

underline is too long
you remove the reference to pythonsdk, I thinit is good to keep it somewhere  no?

Are there any simulators available as Helm charts to demonstrate it in the instructions? Because as far as I remember simulators were not used as Helm charts before. 

Anyways, if they exist then a real example will be possible since there would be all specifications of that chart available to illustrate the example
It is possible to demonstrate it with a random Helm chart that has nothing to do with the integration project maybe, will that work?

Soon we will have some example helm charts related for whole simulator and each independent component from NF simulator.
https://github.com/onap/integration-simulators-nf-simulator/tree/master/helm

https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-integration/en/latest/simulators/nf_simulator.html#nf-simulator

Also I will look ahead in order to prepare helm chart that will obtain certs from local CMPv2 (ONAP EJBCA server)
